hooks.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));const c=d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.command||'';if(/git\s+(commit|push|merge|rebase|cherry-pick|am)\s/.test(c)&&/(--no-verify|-n\b)/.test(c)){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: --no-verify is not allowed. Run tests and commit without bypassing hooks.');process.exit(2);}process.exit(0);"
